markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into GrowthHackers' SEO strategy and results for Lovable, to inform GrowthX's approach.](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthHackers focused on programmatic SEO, particularly "how-to" and video content](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [Lovable's SEO challenges: brand-heavy searches, rapidly evolving competitor landscape](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Content quality and controversial topics (e.g., cryptocurrency) are ongoing concerns](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [Data limitations: intermittent GA4 data, lack of robust internal analytics](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)

## Topics

### GrowthHackers' Background and Lovable Engagement

  - [Berner & Tom: ex-startup founders, now running Growth Hackers Stockholm (10 years)](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Engaged by Lovable in Spring 2023 for SEO analysis and content creation](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=292.0)
  - [Initial focus: "how-to" section and video content as proof of concept](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Contract: \~half-time resource, recently terminated (continuing for a few more months)](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)

### Lovable's SEO Landscape

  - [Dominated by brand searches across multiple languages](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Limited generic search terms; difficulty competing with established tech giants](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)
  - [Key areas: vibe coding, brand terms, competitor comparisons, partner integrations (e.g., Figma, Supabase)](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)
  - [Competitor pages (e.g., vs Bolt, Replit) valuable but require frequent updates](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)

### Content Strategy and Challenges

  - [Programmatic approach: leveraging top 10,000 remixed projects for "how-to" content](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)
  - [Quality concerns: some content flagged as controversial (e.g., cryptocurrency, social impersonation)](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1062.0)
  - [Stakeholder changes led to increased analysis vs. content production](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Limited internal data on project performance (e.g., traffic rankings)](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1126.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [GA4 data deemed "directionally correct" but intermittent due to free tier limitations](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1154.0)
  - [ROI positive on a month-to-month basis for SEO efforts](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)
  - [Example: Projects section generating est. $60k-$100k revenue in a few months](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)

### Recommendations and Future Potential

  - [Scale up "how-to" content: only 10,000 out of millions of projects covered so far](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)
  - [Maintain competitor comparison pages, but with efficient updating process](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=846.0)
  - [Leverage Lovable's category-defining position for link building](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
  - [Explore content opportunities around integrations (e.g., Stripe, GitHub)](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to synthesize insights from this meeting with other stakeholder discussions](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
  - [Explore potential collaboration on data analysis with GrowthHackers](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1852.0)
  - [GrowthX to determine how to integrate or build upon GrowthHackers' programmatic SEO efforts](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1791.0)
  - [Consider strategies for scaling content production while maintaining quality and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/pUoCSzqgRGzkcfgGgVoBCexcZRLvJqyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1817.0)
